title: centaurea inusta
intro: Centaurea inusta, also known as the Rough Centaury or Centaurea inusta, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Centaurea inusta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications for its medicinal benefits.
